name: meta-eval run on known-good calibration enforces the at-most-5-P0-findings ceiling
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/meta-eval/run.sh" --target known-good --findings-stub p0=6 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'p0_count=6' err.txt && grep -q 'p0_max=5' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
